primaryName: City of Rochester ROC Youth Employment Network Helpline (SYEP)

webVerification.sourceLabel: ROC Youth Employment Network official site
webVerification.notes: Web confirms 585-428-6366 as the City of Rochester ROC Youth Employment Network Helpline for the Summer Youth Employment Program (SYEP). Office at 57 St. Paul St, Rochester NY 14604. Email RYEN@rochesterworks.org.
